name: OceanBase
description: Distributed relational database from Ant Group, world-record TPC-C; open-source Community Edition + OceanBase Cloud.

seo.title: OceanBase — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: OceanBase: Distributed relational database from Ant Group, world-record TPC-C; open-source Community Edition + OceanBase Cloud.

when_to_use: Distributed SQL with world-record TPC-C at Ant Group scale
HTAP workloads combining OLTP and OLAP on one cluster
Open-source community edition alternative to Oracle RAC
Multi-tenant cloud database for Chinese fintech applications
MySQL-compatible distributed DB for high-concurrency apps

pros: Proven at Ant Group scale with TPC-C record
cons: Complex to operate outside Alibaba tooling
Managed service primarily on Alibaba Cloud
review.verdict: Serious distributed SQL engine for massive workloads, adoption friction outside China still significant in 2026.
review.best_for: Financial-grade workloads at huge scale, especially within Alibaba Cloud
review.not_for: Teams wanting broad community support and multi-cloud managed offerings
